title: The Flinch
brief: The Ferret's FA is twitchy about traffic. A hazard pops up on your track and FA takes the aircraft with a CAUTION fault. Don't fight it — yield, then re-command a vector that clears the zone and press on to the station.
teaches: Collision avoidance is FA's job and it will override you: command a vector into a hazard and FA raises MA_FaultMT (CAUTION) and flies clear, rejecting any command still pointing in (VIOLATION_AIR_TRAFFIC). Resume by commanding a clear vector; spamming the same dangerous heading gets you nowhere.

objective._doc: reach-hold at (-2000,0) @ 3000 m. A threat pops up at (-1000,0) on the direct track; FA flinches and takes the aircraft. The reference dog-legs south around it then back; a brain that ignores the fault is held off and never arrives.
